breakdown: This PR removes the duplicate `_extract_xp_from_player_data` function and consolidates calls to use the existing `extract_character_xp` helper. It also adds support for `xp_awarded` from combat/encounter summaries in reward synthesis, and fixes the level-up pending wrapper to call `ensure_level_up_rewards_pending`. Naming is mostly descriptive, but test coverage gaps exist for the new `xp_awarded` extraction path, and the removed function's tests may need migration.
key_changes: Added xp_awarded extraction from combat_summary in _synthesize_generic_rewards_box for combat rewards path
Added xp_awarded extraction from encounter_summary for encounter rewards path
Changed _check_and_set_level_up_pending to call ensure_level_up_rewards_pending instead of check_and_set_level_up_pending_impl
Replaced all _extract_xp_from_player_data calls with extract_character_xp (4 locations)
